name: The Secret Swing
address: 879 Green Lea Blvd Suite 105b, Gallatin, TN 37066
about: The Secret Swing is a golf simulator venue featuring Trackman technology for indoor practice and gameplay. It offers a modern, welcoming space accessible to both seasoned players and beginners. Pricing is structured through monthly memberships with varying hour packages and an hourly drop-in option. The facility provides self-guided play and is ideal for those seeking flexible golf experiences in a controlled environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Advanced Trackman technology for precise swing data and realistic course simulation
Flexible booking options with monthly memberships and hourly drop-ins
No-club hassle with a selection provided for all skill levels
Welcoming atmosphere suitable for both practice and casual play

food_and_drink.notes: Guests are welcome to bring their own food and beverages
Guests are welcome to bring their own beverages

simulator_hardware.notes: Primary simulator technology used for tracking and gameplay

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: You're welcome to bring your own clubs, but we also provide a selection of clubs for use at no extra charge.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: We don't provide food and beverages but you are welcome to bring your own.

faq.question: How long does a typical 18-hole session take?
faq.answer: A single round (18 holes) usually takes about 1-2 hours, depending on group size and pace.

faq.question: Is this venue suitable for children or families?
faq.answer: Absolutely, it's for everyone! Beginners can practice without pressure, while seasoned golfers can refine their skills or enjoy a quick round.
